fields.value: Forward deployed engineering (FDE) program with teams working inside mutual customers' environments
ServiceNow AI-native FDE team and industry-led Accenture FDEs, combined into purpose-built pods with platform-native, AI-native, and industry expertise
Only 32% of leaders report sustained, enterprise-wide AI impact, often due to a delivery gap
ServiceNow AI Control Tower governs, secures, and manages AI agents at scale with complete visibility into agent performance and outcomes

evidence.quote: ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW), the AI control tower for business reinvention, and Accenture (NYSE: ACN) announced a forward deployed engineering (FDE) program to help enterprises take agentic AI from enterprise pilot to production at scale.

Through the program, ServiceNow’s AI-native FDE team works together with industry-led Accenture FDEs inside mutual customers’ environments, collaborating to build agentic AI workflows natively on the ServiceNow AI Platform where enterprise work already runs, delivering value in production before enterprise rollout begins.

For every engagement, ServiceNow and Accenture build a purpose-built pod around the specific value chain — combining platform-native, AI-native, and industry expertise to take co-innovation from concept to production together.

According to Accenture’s Pulse of Change research , while AI is widely seen as a driver of revenue growth, only 32% of leaders report sustained, enterprise-wide AI impact. This is not a technology problem, but often due to a delivery gap.
Our teams are in the customers’ environments, implementing ServiceNow , customer, and third-party building blocks, and demonstrating the resulting value metrics in the ServiceNow AI Control Tower .

At the center is ServiceNow's AI Control Tower , a unified command center that governs, secures, and manages AI agents at scale, giving organizations complete visibility into agent performance and outcomes without trading speed for control.
The program is designed to drive measurable business outcomes: faster operations, lower costs, and improved customer experiences at scale.
